name: Braze Cloud Mode (Actions)
description: Send events server-side to the Braze REST API.

api_key.description: Created under Developer Console in the Braze Dashboard.
api_key.label: API Key

app_id.description: The app identifier used to reference specific Apps in requests made to the Braze API. Created under Developer Console in the Braze Dashboard.
app_id.label: App ID

actions.name: Create Alias
actions.description: Create new user aliases for existing identified users, or to create new unidentified users.

fields.label: External ID
fields.description: The external ID of the user to create an alias for.

external_id.title: External ID
external_id.description: The external ID of the user to create an alias for.

fields.label: Alias Name
fields.description: The alias identifier

fields.label: Alias Label
fields.description: A label indicating the type of alias

alias_label.title: Alias Label
alias_label.description: A label indicating the type of alias

actions.name: Create Alias V2
actions.description: Create new user aliases for existing identified users, or to create new unidentified users.

fields.label: External ID
fields.description: The external ID of the user to create an alias for.

external_id.title: External ID
external_id.description: The external ID of the user to create an alias for.

fields.label: Alias Name
fields.description: The alias identifier

fields.label: Alias Label
fields.description: A label indicating the type of alias

alias_label.title: Alias Label
alias_label.description: A label indicating the type of alias

fields.label: How to add Aliases
fields.description: Define how the records from your destination will be synced.

actions.name: Debounce Middleware
actions.description: When enabled, it ensures that only events where at least one changed trait value are sent to Braze, and events with duplicate traits are not sent. Debounce functionality requires a frontend client to work. Therefore, it cannot be used with server-side libraries or with Engage.

actions.name: Ecommerce Event (multi product)
actions.description: (Beta) Send a multi product [Ecommerce Recommended event](https://www.braze.com/docs/user_guide/data/activation/custom_data/recommended_events/ecommerce_events) to Braze.

fields.label: Ecommerce Event Name
fields.description: The name of the Braze ecommerce recommended event

name.title: Ecommerce Event Name
name.description: The name of the Braze ecommerce recommended event

fields.label: External User ID
fields.description: The unique user identifier

fields.label: User Alias Object
fields.description: A user alias object. See [the docs](https://www.braze.com/docs/api/objects_filters/user_alias_object/).

fields.label: Email
fields.description: The user email

fields.label: Phone Number
fields.description: The user's phone number

fields.label: Braze User Identifier
fields.description: The unique user identifier

fields.label: Cancel Reason
fields.description: Reason why the order was cancelled.

cancel_reason.title: Cancel Reason
cancel_reason.description: Reason why the order was cancelled.

fields.label: Time
fields.description: Timestamp for when the event occurred.

time.title: Time
time.description: Timestamp for when the event occurred.

fields.label: Checkout ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the checkout.

fields.label: Order ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the order placed.

order_id.title: Order ID
order_id.description: Unique identifier for the order placed.

fields.label: Cart ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the cart. If no value is passed, Braze will determine a default value (shared across cart, checkout, and order events) for the user cart mapping.

cart_id.title: Cart ID
cart_id.description: Unique identifier for the cart. If no value is passed, Braze will determine a default value (shared across cart, checkout, and order events) for the user cart mapping.

fields.label: Total Value
fields.description: Total monetary value of the cart.

total_value.title: Total Value
total_value.description: Total monetary value of the cart.

fields.label: Total Discounts
fields.description: Total amount of discounts applied to the order.

total_discounts.title: Total Discounts
total_discounts.description: Total amount of discounts applied to the order.

fields.label: Discounts
fields.description: Details of all discounts applied to the order.

discounts.title: Discounts
discounts.description: Details of all discounts applied to the order.

fields.label: Currency
fields.description: Currency code for the transaction. Defaults to USD if no value passed.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Currency code for the transaction. Defaults to USD if no value passed.

fields.label: Source
fields.description: Source the event is derived from.

source.title: Source
source.description: Source the event is derived from.

fields.label: Metadata
fields.description: Additional metadata for the ecommerce event.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Additional metadata for the ecommerce event.

fields.label: Batch Data to Braze
fields.description: If true, Segment will batch events before sending to Braze’s user track endpoint.

enable_batching.title: Batch Data to Braze
enable_batching.description: If true, Segment will batch events before sending to Braze’s user track endpoint.

fields.label: Maximum Batch Size
fields.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

batch_size.title: Maximum Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

fields.label: Products
fields.description: List of products associated with the ecommerce event. Standard product fields are mapped by default. Any additional fields added into a product item will be sent as product level metadata.

products.title: Products
products.description: List of products associated with the ecommerce event. Standard product fields are mapped by default. Any additional fields added into a product item will be sent as product level metadata.

product_id.title: Product ID
product_id.description: A unique identifier for the product that was viewed. This value be can be the product ID or SKU

product_name.title: Product Name
product_name.description: The name of the product that was viewed.

variant_id.title: Variant ID
variant_id.description: A unique identifier for the product variant. An example is shirt_medium_blue

image_url.title: Image URL
image_url.description: The URL of the product image.

product_url.title: Product URL
product_url.description: URL to the product page for more details.

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the cart.

price.title: Price
price.description: The variant unit price of the product at the time of viewing.

fields.label: How to track events
fields.description: Define how the records from your destination will be synced.

actions.name: Identify User
actions.description: Identifies an unidentified (alias-only) user. Use alongside the Create Alias action, or with user aliases you have already defined.

fields.label: External ID
fields.description: The external ID of the user to identify.

external_id.title: External ID
external_id.description: The external ID of the user to identify.

fields.label: User Alias Object
fields.description: A user alias object. See [the docs](https://www.braze.com/docs/api/objects_filters/user_alias_object/).

fields.label: Merge Behavior
fields.description: Sets the endpoint to merge some fields found exclusively on the anonymous user to the identified user. See [the docs](https://www.braze.com/docs/api/endpoints/user_data/post_user_identify/#request-parameters).

merge_behavior.title: Merge Behavior
merge_behavior.description: Sets the endpoint to merge some fields found exclusively on the anonymous user to the identified user. See [the docs](https://www.braze.com/docs/api/endpoints/user_data/post_user_identify/#request-parameters).

fields.label: Email to Identify

actions.name: Trigger Campaign
actions.description: Trigger a Braze Campaign via API-triggered delivery

fields.label: Campaign ID
fields.description: The ID of the Braze campaign to trigger. The campaign must be an API-triggered campaign created in Braze.

campaign_id.title: Campaign ID
campaign_id.description: The ID of the Braze campaign to trigger. The campaign must be an API-triggered campaign created in Braze.

fields.label: Send ID
fields.description: Optional string to identify the send. This can be used for send level analytics, or to cancel a send.

send_id.title: Send ID
send_id.description: Optional string to identify the send. This can be used for send level analytics, or to cancel a send.

fields.label: Trigger Properties
fields.description: Optional data that will be used to personalize the campaign message. Personalization key-value pairs that will apply to all users in this request.

trigger_properties.title: Trigger Properties
trigger_properties.description: Optional data that will be used to personalize the campaign message. Personalization key-value pairs that will apply to all users in this request.

fields.label: Broadcast
fields.description: If set to true, and if the audience is not provided, the campaign will be sent to all the users in the segment targeted by the campaign. It can not be used with "recipients".

broadcast.title: Broadcast
broadcast.description: If set to true, and if the audience is not provided, the campaign will be sent to all the users in the segment targeted by the campaign. It can not be used with "recipients".

fields.label: Attachments
fields.description: Attachments to send along with the campaign. Limited to 2MB per file.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.description: Attachments to send along with the campaign. Limited to 2MB per file.

file_name.title: File Name
file_name.description: The name of the file to be attached.

url.title: URL
url.description: The URL of the file to be attached.

fields.label: Recipients
fields.description: An array of user identifiers to send the campaign to. It can not be used with "broadcast".

recipients.title: Recipients
recipients.description: An array of user identifiers to send the campaign to. It can not be used with "broadcast".

external_user_id.title: External User ID
external_user_id.description: External identifier of user to receive message.

user_alias.title: User Alias
user_alias.description: User alias object to identify the user.

email.title: Email
email.description: Email address of user to receive message.

trigger_properties.title: User Trigger Properties
trigger_properties.description: Properties that will override the default trigger_properties for a specific user.

send_to_existing_only.title: Send to Existing Only
send_to_existing_only.description: Defaults to true, can't be used with user aliases; if set to false, an attributes object must also be included.

attributes.title: User Attributes
attributes.description: Fields in the attributes object will create or update an attribute of that name with the given value on the specified user profile before the message is sent and existing values will be overwritten.

fields.label: Prioritization
fields.description: Prioritization settings; required when using email in recipients. This prioritization will be applied to all recipients.

prioritization.title: Prioritization
prioritization.description: Prioritization settings; required when using email in recipients. This prioritization will be applied to all recipients.

first_priority.title: First Priority
first_priority.description: First priority in the prioritization sequence

second_priority.title: Second Priority
second_priority.description: Second priority in the prioritization sequence

fields.label: Audience
fields.description: A standard audience object to specify the users to send the campaign to. Including "audience" will only send to users in the audience

audience.title: Audience
audience.description: A standard audience object to specify the users to send the campaign to. Including "audience" will only send to users in the audience

actions.name: Trigger Canvas
actions.description: Trigger a Braze Canvas to deliver a cross-channel message to the specified user.

fields.label: Canvas ID
fields.description: The ID of the canvas to trigger. The canvas must be API-triggered and the status must be "Draft" or "Active".

canvas_id.title: Canvas ID
canvas_id.description: The ID of the canvas to trigger. The canvas must be API-triggered and the status must be "Draft" or "Active".

fields.label: Canvas Entry Properties
fields.description: Optional data that will be used to personalize the canvas message. Personalization key-value pairs that will apply to all users in this request.

canvas_entry_properties.title: Canvas Entry Properties
canvas_entry_properties.description: Optional data that will be used to personalize the canvas message. Personalization key-value pairs that will apply to all users in this request.

fields.label: Broadcast
fields.description: If set to true, the canvas will be sent to all the users in the segment targeted by the canvas. It cannot be used with "recipients".

broadcast.title: Broadcast
broadcast.description: If set to true, the canvas will be sent to all the users in the segment targeted by the canvas. It cannot be used with "recipients".

fields.label: Recipients
fields.description: An array of user identifiers to send the canvas to. It cannot be used with "broadcast".

recipients.title: Recipients
recipients.description: An array of user identifiers to send the canvas to. It cannot be used with "broadcast".

external_user_id.title: External User ID
external_user_id.description: External identifier of user to receive message.

user_alias.title: User Alias
user_alias.description: User alias object of the user.

email.title: Email
email.description: Email address of user to receive message.

canvas_entry_properties.title: Canvas Entry Properties
canvas_entry_properties.description: Properties that will override the default canvas_entry_properties for a specific user.

send_to_existing_only.title: Send to Existing Only
send_to_existing_only.description: Defaults to true, cannot be used with user aliases; if set to false, an attributes object must also be included.

attributes.title: Attributes
attributes.description: Fields in the attributes object will create or update an attribute of that name with the given value on the specified user profile before the message is sent and existing values will be overwritten.

fields.label: Prioritization
fields.description: Prioritization settings; required when using email in recipients. This prioritization will be applied to all recipients.

prioritization.title: Prioritization
prioritization.description: Prioritization settings; required when using email in recipients. This prioritization will be applied to all recipients.

first_priority.title: First Priority
first_priority.description: First priority in the prioritization sequence

second_priority.title: Second Priority
second_priority.description: Second priority in the prioritization sequence

fields.label: Audience
fields.description: A standard audience object to specify the users to send the canvas to. Including "audience" will only send to users in the audience

actions.name: Update User Profile
actions.description: Update a user's profile attributes in Braze

fields.label: External User ID
fields.description: The unique user identifier

fields.label: User Alias Object
fields.description: A user alias object. See [the docs](https://www.braze.com/docs/api/objects_filters/user_alias_object/).

fields.label: Braze User Identifier
fields.description: The unique user identifier

fields.label: Country
fields.description: The country code of the user

country.title: Country
country.description: The country code of the user

fields.label: Current Location
fields.description: The user's current longitude/latitude.

fields.label: Date of First Session
fields.description: The date the user first used the app

date_of_first_session.title: Date of First Session
date_of_first_session.description: The date the user first used the app

fields.label: Date of Last Session
fields.description: The date the user last used the app

date_of_last_session.title: Date of Last Session
date_of_last_session.description: The date the user last used the app

fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.description: The user's date of birth

fields.label: Email
fields.description: The user's email

fields.label: Email Subscribe
fields.description: The user's email subscription preference: “opted_in” (explicitly registered to receive email messages), “unsubscribed” (explicitly opted out of email messages), and “subscribed” (neither opted in nor out).

email_subscribe.title: Email Subscribe
email_subscribe.description: The user's email subscription preference: “opted_in” (explicitly registered to receive email messages), “unsubscribed” (explicitly opted out of email messages), and “subscribed” (neither opted in nor out).

fields.label: Email Open Tracking Disabled
fields.description: Set to true to disable the open tracking pixel from being added to all future emails sent to this user.

email_open_tracking_disabled.title: Email Open Tracking Disabled
email_open_tracking_disabled.description: Set to true to disable the open tracking pixel from being added to all future emails sent to this user.

fields.label: Email Click Tracking Disabled
fields.description: Set to true to disable the click tracking for all links within a future email, sent to this user.

email_click_tracking_disabled.title: Email Click Tracking Disabled
email_click_tracking_disabled.description: Set to true to disable the click tracking for all links within a future email, sent to this user.

fields.label: Facebook Attribution Data
fields.description: Hash of Facebook attribution containing any of `id` (string), `likes` (array of strings), `num_friends` (integer).

facebook.title: Facebook Attribution Data
facebook.description: Hash of Facebook attribution containing any of `id` (string), `likes` (array of strings), `num_friends` (integer).

fields.label: First Name
